__inputs.name: DS_GUARDIAN
__inputs.label: Guardian DB
__inputs.description: SQLite or TimescaleDB datasource for eval_traces

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pipeline_name) AS pipelines, COUNT(DISTINCT step_name) AS steps, COUNT(*) AS total_traces FROM eval_traces WHERE created_at >= datetime('now', '-7 days')

SELECT date(created_at) AS time, pipeline_name || ' / ' || step_name AS metric, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN passed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS value FROM eval_traces WHERE created_at >= datetime('now', '-${days:raw} days') GROUP BY date(created_at), pipeline_name, step_name ORDER BY time

SELECT date(created_at) AS time, pipeline_name || ' / ' || step_name AS metric, AVG(score) AS value FROM eval_traces WHERE created_at >= datetime('now', '-${days:raw} days') GROUP BY date(created_at), pipeline_name, step_name ORDER BY time

SELECT action, COUNT(*) AS count FROM eval_traces WHERE created_at >= datetime('now', '-${days:raw} days') AND ('${pipeline:raw}' = '' OR pipeline_name = '${pipeline:raw}') GROUP BY action ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT step_name, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN NOT passed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS failure_rate FROM eval_traces WHERE created_at >= datetime('now', '-${days:raw} days') AND ('${pipeline:raw}' = '' OR pipeline_name = '${pipeline:raw}') GROUP BY step_name ORDER BY failure_rate DESC
SELECT pipeline_name, step_name, action, score, issues, created_at FROM eval_traces WHERE NOT passed AND created_at >= datetime('now', '-7 days') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT date(created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS traces, SUM(CASE WHEN passed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passed, SUM(CASE WHEN NOT passed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed FROM eval_traces WHERE created_at >= datetime('now', '-${days:raw} days') GROUP BY date(created_at) ORDER BY time

list.name: pipeline
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT pipeline_name FROM eval_traces ORDER BY pipeline_name
